## Meeting Purpose

[Vivek's handover check-in on the Prophecy account.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy:** Prophecy pivoted from "Databricks easier" to "AI data prep for analysts," a shift forced by Databricks' own AI layer. Content now targets high-volume dev keywords with a thought-leadership narrative for non-technical users.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [**Restarting from Zero:** A full marketing team turnover and domain migration (`.io` → `.ai`) erased all prior SEO gains, requiring a complete restart.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [**Production Focus:** The immediate priority is high-volume article production and publishing to rebuild traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [**Pipeline Optimization:** Vivek shared an Agentic pipeline SOP to improve efficiency, including using a custom artifact for fact-checking and switching the researcher to Tavali to cut run times by \~20 minutes.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)

## Topics

### Account Reset & Strategic Pivot

  - [**Problem:** The previous strategy (making Databricks easier) was made redundant by Databricks' own AI layer.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [**Consequence:** A full marketing team turnover and domain migration (`.io` → `.ai`) erased all prior SEO gains, requiring a complete restart.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** Target analysts with AI agents for ad-hoc data prep, freeing them from engineering queues.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Narrative:** BI tools are for analysis; Prophecy is for the essential data prep that precedes it.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [**Content:** Targets high-volume dev keywords (e.g., "BI platforms") with a thought-leadership angle for non-technical users.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Distribution:** Currently limited to publishing; no link-building is planned.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

### Content Production & Review

  - [**Production:** The focus is on high-volume production and publishing to rebuild traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [**Article Length:** Articles are kept concise (1k–2k words) to support the direct, narrative-driven approach.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [**Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [**Cody:** Edits are minimal (1–3 small narrative points per article).](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
      - [**Raj:** Has reviewed one article, providing minor, picky comments that Cody resolved.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
      - [**Saskia:** Is creating a client operating manual with a dated log of all narrative feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)

### Pipeline & Process Optimization

  - [**Agentic Pipeline:** Prophecy uses the Agentic pipeline; Saskia has a list of potential improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [**Optimization SOP (from Vivek):**](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)
      - [**Process:** Generate H2s/H3s with Claude → feed only the headings to the Agentic pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This method consistently produces good results.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
  - [**Pipeline Customization:**](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [**Fact-Checking:** Use the client operating manual as a custom artifact to check adherence to narrative and style guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [**Researcher:** Switch from EXA to Tavali to reduce run times by \~20 minutes.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [**Resource:** Nathan (ME on DataGrid) is a high-volume Agentic user and can provide support.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [Follow up with Cody for GA4 access.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
      - [Check with Kyle on the status of AEO queries.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [**Ehtisham:**](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
      - [Test the new Agentic SOP (H2s/H3s only).](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [Explore using a custom artifact for fact-checking.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [Switch the pipeline researcher to Tavali.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [**Saskia:**](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [Finalize and hand over the client operating manual to Ehtisham.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
      - [Establish a one-week production buffer for Ehtisham's handover.](https://fathom.video/share/WZaNhUJ7owr7m16iVndCf-yE1KUwRdGv?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
